task_description: Full analysis of Coworker repo (1280 files) + technical report + code references + skill review (3 reports + evals) + implementation of 3 behavioral rules + skill upgrade v1.1→v1.3 with atomic writes + zombie detection + production deploy
llm_estimate_source: Based on typical LLM estimates for: code analysis (2-3 days), technical report (1-2 weeks), skill review (3-5 days), implementation (1 week), deployment (2-3 days). Summed and compressed for parallel execution.
notes: Includes whale monitoring setup ($100M Galaxy Digital) as parallel task. First measurement of dataset. LLM estimate is conservative composite from typical model responses.
